his background:

he is a Omatikayan/Forest Na’vi who strives to become a great warrior and leader just like his father, Jake Sully, an Avatar.

He is the oldest brother of the four of his family, the Sully’s. His younger, adoptive sister, Kiri, is the second oldest. His younger brother, Lo’ak, is the third oldest. And finally, his youngest sister, Tuktirey, or Tuk is the youngest daughter and final member of the Sully family.
